question: Implement a `Student` class with private members for `studentID` (int) and `name` (string). Add a parameterized constructor and a public method `enrollInCourse(string courseName)` that simply prints a message indicating the student has enrolled in the given course.

test_cases.expected: Student Harry Potter (ID: 301) has enrolled in Potions Class.
Student Hermione Granger (ID: 302) has enrolled in Ancient Runes.
Student Ron Weasley (ID: 303) has enrolled in Charms.
